reasoning: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon with 78-cent spread (fast 740.22, pivot 740.56, slow 741.0). Price 739.08 is 148 cents below pivot, signaling bearish momentum. Last 3 bars show strong rejection: green recovery (11:45, mod 35% body) followed by massive bearish candle at 11:50 (RED, 91% body, 1.85M volume spike) driving price from 740.25 to 738.81 low, then weak doji recovery at 11:55 (18% body). The dominant RED bar with high volume is the key signal. However, small recovery bar + price exactly at Active support level (738.54, within 54 cents) moderates confidence — this could be a bounce setup at support rather than a continuation down. Overnight gap flat, VIX neutral at 18.22 (MID regime).
